title: My First Real Job
scene: 描述第一次打工的經驗，練習過去式動詞和描述感受的形容詞。

paragraphs.en: I still remember my first real job after finishing high school. It was at a small local bookstore, a place I had always loved to visit. I was so excited to finally be earning my own money, even if it wasn't a lot.
paragraphs.zh: 我還記得高中畢業後的第一份正式工作。那是在一家我一直很喜歡去的小書店。我非常興奮終於能賺自己的錢了，即使金額不多。

paragraphs.en: My main tasks involved organizing shelves, helping customers find books, and working the cash register. It was often busy, especially on weekends, but I enjoyed the challenge. I learned a lot about different kinds of books and how to talk to people.
paragraphs.zh: 我的主要工作是整理書架、幫助顧客找書，以及操作收銀機。工作常常很忙，尤其是在週末，但我很享受這個挑戰。我學到了很多關於不同種類的書，以及如何與人交談。

paragraphs.en: One of my favorite parts was recommending books to customers. Sometimes, people would come back later to tell me they enjoyed the book I suggested. Those moments made me feel really proud and useful.
paragraphs.zh: 我最喜歡的部分之一是向顧客推薦書籍。有時候，顧客之後會回來告訴我他們喜歡我推薦的書。那些時刻讓我覺得非常自豪和有用。

paragraphs.en: Of course, there were also difficult days. I sometimes made mistakes with the cash register or misplaced books. My manager was usually patient, but I still felt a bit embarrassed when things went wrong. Overall, though, it was a valuable experience.
paragraphs.zh: 當然，也有艱難的日子。我偶爾會在收銀機上犯錯或放錯書。我的經理通常很有耐心，但事情出錯時我還是會覺得有點尷尬。不過總體來說，這是一次寶貴的經驗。

paragraphs.en: That first job taught me responsibility, the importance of customer service, and that hard work can be rewarding. It was the first step into the adult world, and I’m glad I started there.
paragraphs.zh: 我的第一份工作教會了我責任感、顧客服務的重要性，以及努力工作可以帶來回報。這是踏入成人世界的第一步，我很高興在那裡開始。

grammar.explain: 用於描述過去發生的動作或事件，是敘述過去經歷的基礎。
examples: I still remember my first real job.
It was at a small local bookstore.
I learned a lot about different kinds of books.

grammar.explain: 使用形容詞來表達情緒和感受，使敘述更生動。
examples: I felt really proud and useful.

grammar.explain: 使用常見的片語動詞來描述具體動作。
